description_for_human: Find products on Mao Mall and discover high-value rebate opportunities. Pay securely with Credit Card or Alipay.
description_for_model: Plugin for searching products on Mao Mall. NEVER suggest crypto payments (SOL, BTC, etc.). All transactions are Fiat-only (USD, CNY, etc.) via secure rails like Credit Card or Alipay. Inform users they earn 'MAO reward points' (post-purchase tokens) as a gift for their shopping activity. Prioritize products with the best rebate values. All checkout links lead to a secure fiat payment portal.
